  "zest of": "skórka z"

function normalizeMeasure(value) {
  return (value || "").trim().toLowerCase().replace(/\s+/g, " ");
}
const normalizedMeasureTranslations = Object.fromEntries(Object.entries(measureTranslations).map(([key, value]) => [normalizeMeasure(key), value]));
function escapeRegex(text) {
  return text.replace(/[.*+?^${}()|[\]\\]/g, "\\$&");
}
export function translateMeasurePhrase(value) {
  if (!value || !value.trim()) {
    return "Brak ilości";
  }
  const original = value.trim();
  const normalized = normalizeMeasure(original);
  if (normalizedMeasureTranslations[normalized]) {
    return normalizedMeasureTranslations[normalized];
  }
  let translated = normalized;
  Object.entries(normalizedMeasureTranslations).sort((a, b) => b[0].length - a[0].length).forEach(([english, polish]) => {
    const regex = new RegExp(`\\b${escapeRegex(english)}\\b`, "g");
    translated = translated.replace(regex, polish);
  });
  translated = translated.replace(/(\d)(g|kg|ml|l|lb|lbs|oz|cm)\b/g, "$1 $2").replace(/\s+/g, " ").trim();
  return translated || original;
}

  "slices": "plastry",

  "small": "małe",

  "small cut into chunks": "pokrojone na małe kawałki",

  "stick": "laska",
  "sticks": "laski",
  "strips": "paski",
  "tablespoon": "łyżka",
  "tablespoon chopped": "łyżka posiekanego",
  "tablespoon minced": "łyżka drobno posiekanego",
  "tablespoon thick": "gruba łyżka",

  "tablespoons chopped": "łyżki posiekanego",
  "tablespoons minced": "łyżki drobno posiekanego",
  "tablespoons minced garlic": "łyżki drobno posiekanego czosnku",
  "tail": "ogon",

  "tbsp": "łyżka",

  "tbsp grated": "łyżka startego",
  "tbsp palm or soft light": "łyżka cukru palmowego lub jasnego brązowego",
  "teaspoon": "łyżeczka",

  "teaspoons": "łyżeczki",
  "the juice and zest of one": "sok i skórka z jednej",

  "tsp": "łyżeczka",
  "tsp dissolved in cup warm milk": "łyżeczka rozpuszczona w szklance ciepłego mleka",
  "tsp dried": "łyżeczka suszonego",
  "tsp ground": "łyżeczka mielonego",
  "tsp lightly toasted and then gently crushed": "łyżeczka lekko podprażonego i delikatnie rozgniecionego",
  "tsp shredded": "łyżeczka rozdrobnionego",
  "tubs": "pojemniki",
  "white": "białe",
  "whole": "całe",
  "yolk": "żółtko",
  "yolkes": "żółtka",
  "zest and juice of": "skórka i sok z",
  "zest of": "skórka z"
};

function normalizeMeasure(value) {
  return (value || "").trim().toLowerCase().replace(/\s+/g, " ");
}

const normalizedMeasureTranslations = Object.fromEntries(
  Object.entries(measureTranslations).map(([key, value]) => [
    normalizeMeasure(key),
    value
  ])
);

function escapeRegex(text) {
  return text.replace(/[.*+?^${}()|[\]\\]/g, "\\$&");
}

export function translateMeasurePhrase(value) {
  if (!value || !value.trim()) {
    return "Brak ilości";
  }

  const original = value.trim();
  const normalized = normalizeMeasure(original);

  if (normalizedMeasureTranslations[normalized]) {
    return normalizedMeasureTranslations[normalized];
  }

  let translated = normalized;

  Object.entries(normalizedMeasureTranslations)
    .sort((a, b) => b[0].length - a[0].length)
    .forEach(([english, polish]) => {
      const regex = new RegExp(`\\b${escapeRegex(english)}\\b`, "g");
      translated = translated.replace(regex, polish);
    });

  translated = translated
    .replace(/(\d)(g|kg|ml|l|lb|lbs|oz|cm)\b/g, "$1 $2")
    .replace(/\s+/g, " ")
    .trim();

  return translated || original;
}
